data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of attribution to source campaign and conversion outcome, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this aspect. While the linked use case mentions the need for attribution, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate its implementation or validation. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary evidence to confirm satisfaction of the requirement is absent.
gaps: No evidence of attribution to source campaign and conversion outcome validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the attribution to source campaign and conversion outcome.
